judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (grayscale aerial photograph, bright object circled in red, teal crosshair, corner brackets, 'N' indicator, redaction bars), but Description B adds specific quoted text from stamps and headers not mentioned in A.
original_image_tags: grainy, grayscale infrared sensor still of a textured surface, likely water or terrain. A cyan targeting reticle with a central cross is visible in the center of the frame. In the upper-left quadrant, a bright, white, elongated object is circled in red. There are four cyan corner brackets framing the central area of the image. A cyan 'N' indicating north is visible below the central reticle. The top of the image contains two black redaction bars obscuring text.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Grayscale aerial or sensor image with a cloudy textured background, a small bright point near the upper center circled in red, a central cyan crosshair, four cyan corner brackets, and a cyan “N” near the lower center; declassification text and report annotations are overlaid.*
